languages.text: "Я уже спросила их совета, Ваша Светлость. Священники сказали выкинуть саван-листья и хоронить наших павших по корабельной традиции. Они говорят, что нам больше не нужно выживать, ведь мы под вашим покровительством. Возможно, они правы и нам пора отказаться от обычаев нашего мира..."

"I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."
languages.original_text: "Я уже спросила их совета, Ваша Светлость. Священники сказали выкинуть саван-листья и хоронить наших павших по корабельной традиции. Они говорят, что нам больше не нужно выживать, ведь мы под вашим покровительством. Возможно, они правы и нам пора отказаться от обычаев нашего мира..."

traits.locale_text: "I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

"I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."
"Are you telling me that Zarkov was poised on the brink of heresy? That yet another pillar of my faith has been proven false?"

"I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

languages.text: 「ザルコフは異端の淵に立っていたのですか。私の信仰の柱がまた一つ崩されたのですか」
languages.original_text: "Are you telling me that Zarkov was poised on the brink of heresy? That yet another pillar of my faith has been proven false?"

languages.text: "Onların tavsiyesine çoktan başvurdum, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Rahipler bize kefen yapraklarından kurtulmamızı ve şehitlerimizi gemi geleneklerine göre gömmemizi söyledi. Sizin himayenizde olduğumuz için hayatta kalma mücadelemizin sona erdiğini söylüyorlar. Belki de haklılar, artık dünyamızın geleneklerinden vazgeçme zamanımız gelmiş olabilir..."
languages.original_text: "I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

traits.locale_text: "Onların tavsiyesine çoktan başvurdum, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Rahipler bize kefen yapraklarından kurtulmamızı ve şehitlerimizi gemi geleneklerine göre gömmemizi söyledi. Sizin himayenizde olduğumuz için hayatta kalma mücadelemizin sona erdiğini söylüyorlar. Belki de haklılar, artık dünyamızın geleneklerinden vazgeçme zamanımız gelmiş olabilir..."

languages.text: “我已经向他们请教过了，大人。牧师们让我们扔掉裹尸叶，并按舰上的惯例安葬亡者。他们说，既然得到了您的庇护，我们为生存而进行的抗争就已结束。或许他们说得对……是时候放下我们世界的旧习俗了……”
languages.original_text: "I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

traits.locale_text: “我已经向他们请教过了，大人。牧师们让我们扔掉裹尸叶，并按舰上的惯例安葬亡者。他们说，既然得到了您的庇护，我们为生存而进行的抗争就已结束。或许他们说得对……是时候放下我们世界的旧习俗了……”

languages.text: "Ich habe ihren Rat bereits eingeholt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Priester befahlen uns, die Schleierblätter zu entsorgen und unsere Gefallenen im Einklang mit der Schiffstradition zu bestatten. Sie sagen, nun, da Ihr über uns wacht, ist unser Überlebenskampf vorbei. Vielleicht haben sie recht und es wird Zeit, die Gebräuche unserer Welt hinter uns zu lassen ..."
languages.original_text: "I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe ihren Rat bereits eingeholt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Priester befahlen uns, die Schleierblätter zu entsorgen und unsere Gefallenen im Einklang mit der Schiffstradition zu bestatten. Sie sagen, nun, da Ihr über uns wacht, ist unser Überlebenskampf vorbei. Vielleicht haben sie recht und es wird Zeit, die Gebräuche unserer Welt hinter uns zu lassen ..."

languages.text: « Je suis déjà allée m'entretenir avec eux, Votre Seigneurie. Les prêtres nous ont dit de nous débarrasser des linceuls de feuilles et d'enterrer nos morts, conformément à vos traditions. Selon eux, puisque nous bénéficions de votre protection, nous n'avons plus à craindre pour notre survie. Ils ont peut-être raison... Il est temps pour nous d'abandonner nos us et coutumes... »
languages.original_text: "I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis déjà allée m'entretenir avec eux, Votre Seigneurie. Les prêtres nous ont dit de nous débarrasser des linceuls de feuilles et d'enterrer nos morts, conformément à vos traditions. Selon eux, puisque nous bénéficions de votre protection, nous n'avons plus à craindre pour notre survie. Ils ont peut-être raison... Il est temps pour nous d'abandonner nos us et coutumes... »

languages.text: «Ya he pedido su consejo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Los sacerdotes nos dijeron que nos olvidáramos de las hojas sudario y enterráramos a nuestros caídos según la tradición de a bordo. Dicen que, ahora que contamos con su protección, nuestra lucha por la supervivencia ha acabado. Puede que tengan razón y sea hora de abandonar las costumbres de nuestro mundo...».
languages.original_text: "I have already sought their counsel, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The priests told us to get rid of the shroud-leaves and bury our fallen according to shipboard tradition. They say, since we have your patronage, our struggle for survival is over. Perhaps they are right, and it is time for us to let go of the customs of our world..."
